questions.text: Which of the following is the most prestigious general-tech accelerator that has funded Web3 startups like Coinbase and OpenSea?
questions.explanation: Y Combinator (YC) is the world's most renowned accelerator, having funded Coinbase, OpenSea, and many other successful blockchain companies.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: B

Y Combinator (YC) is the world's most renowned accelerator, having funded Coinbase, OpenSea, and many other successful blockchain companies.

questions.text: What is the primary benefit of mentioning your MST grant in a VC pitch?

options.text: It acts as social proof and technical validation
It replaces the need for a demo
It reduces the equity you need to give away

questions.explanation: VCs view an MST grant as external validation - someone else has already vetted your project. It’s a trust accelerator.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: B

VCs view an MST grant as external validation - someone else has already vetted your project. It’s a trust accelerator.

questions.text: Which of the following is a key difference between pitching to an MST Grant Committee and pitching to a Web3 VC?

options.text: VCs care more about market size and return on investment, while the grant committee cares about ecosystem alignment
The grant committee requires a financial model

questions.explanation: VCs are financial investors; they want to see a path to a 10x return. Grant committees prioritize technical innovation and ecosystem fit.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: B

VCs are financial investors; they want to see a path to a 10x return. Grant committees prioritize technical innovation and ecosystem fit.

questions.text: According to the sub-module, what is the most effective way to get a warm introduction to a Web3 VC?

options.text: Send a cold email with a long deck
Ask your MST mentor or an ecosystem connection for an introduction

questions.explanation: Warm intros from trusted sources (like MST mentors) have a far higher success rate than cold outreach. VCs prioritize referrals.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: B

Warm intros from trusted sources (like MST mentors) have a far higher success rate than cold outreach. VCs prioritize referrals.

questions.text: When is the best time to approach a Web3 VC for funding?

options.text: Immediately after receiving the MST grant
When you have independent traction (users, revenue) beyond the grant
Only when you are out of money

questions.explanation: VCs want to see that you’ve used the grant to generate real momentum - not just build an MVP. Traction makes the ask credible.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: B

VCs want to see that you’ve used the grant to generate real momentum - not just build an MVP. Traction makes the ask credible.

questions.text: What is the standard Y Combinator investment deal (as of 2025)?
questions.explanation: YC’s current standard deal is $500,000 for 7% equity, providing significant runway for early-stage startups.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: B

YC’s current standard deal is $500,000 for 7% equity, providing significant runway for early-stage startups.

questions.text: "Once you receive an MST grant, you no longer need to build independent traction before approaching VCs."

Your MST-based dApp has just received a buildGrant of $10,000 and has 500 testnet users. Outline a 3-step plan for approaching a top-tier Web3 VC over the next 6 months. Mention specific actions you would take to build traction and secure a warm introduction.
questions.explanation: 1 mark: Steps include building independent traction (e.g., mainnet launch, user growth) and leveraging the MST mentor for warm intros.1 mark: Concrete actions (Twitter engagement, demo day participation, data room preparation).
questions.modelAnswer:
📊 Marks Guide

1 mark: Steps include building independent traction (e.g., mainnet launch, user growth) and leveraging the MST mentor for warm intros.
1 mark: Concrete actions (Twitter engagement, demo day participation, data room preparation).
